clusters.label: Economic Cases for Tenure-Based Forest Restoration
clusters.description: This cluster synthesizes economic analyses and policy frameworks demonstrating how securing land tenure, enabling community rights, and investing in native species restoration create measurable financial and climate benefits across tropical landscapes in India, Brazil, and Latin America.

clusters.label: Scaling Farmer-Led Restoration Through Finance and Policy
clusters.description: This cluster documents how African and Latin American countries are using payment-for-ecosystem-services policies, inclusive financing mechanisms, and farmer-centered approaches to scale landscape restoration while generating livelihoods and environmental benefits.

clusters.label: Financing and Scaling Landscape Restoration
clusters.description: This cluster represents integrated knowledge on mobilizing public and private capital, designing incentive mechanisms, and implementing practical strategies to finance and scale land and forest restoration at landscape levels globally.

clusters.label: Monitoring and Scaling Tree Restoration
clusters.description: This cluster synthesizes methodologies, tools, and frameworks for measuring, mapping, and implementing large-scale forest and tree restoration while centering local partnerships, indigenous land rights, and species-appropriate practices.

clusters.label: Climate-Resilient Agriculture and Nature-Based Solutions
clusters.description: This cluster represents knowledge on scaling transformative agricultural adaptation and nature-based solutions to build climate resilience, enhance food security, and sequester carbon across sub-Saharan Africa and beyond, with guidance for policymakers, funders, researchers, and the financial sector.

clusters.label: Landscape Restoration Implementation and Policy
clusters.description: This cluster synthesizes knowledge on scaling landscape restoration across Africa through multi-stakeholder coordination, policy alignment, and evidence-based practice while addressing institutional and financial barriers to implementation.

clusters.label: Business Models for Landscape Restoration
clusters.description: This cluster synthesizes emerging evidence that landscape restoration can generate financial returns while delivering environmental and social benefits, profiling restoration enterprises, economic opportunities, and case studies across geographies and business models.

clusters.label: Restoration Planning, Monitoring, and Governance
clusters.description: This cluster represents integrated methodologies and frameworks for assessing restoration opportunities, monitoring progress, selecting analytical tools, and understanding the social networks and stakeholder engagement essential to successful forest and landscape restoration.
